fontSize 1100
labelFontSize 200

# ==== Box: U+04B9
strokeWidth 20
strokeColor 9E9E9E
drawRectangle pen 0 1440 1400 -900 stroke
glyphMode fill
drawGlyph pen 390 0 /uni04B9
drawLabel pen 700 -800 center "U+04B9"
move 1400
